issue: Difficulty: ❌ MEDIUM - Requires at least HARD for python

agent_report.changes_summary: Fixed instruction sufficiency by documenting idempotency key format, ingest 200/409 response shapes, full POST body rules, Appendix H reconciliation, and the exact transcript format directly in instruction.md. Hardened difficulty with real interacting logic: amend can retarget the player (not just delta) via new INC-4 rulings, and a zero score floor (H-2026-04) via INC-5 that clamps bob's post-adjustment score. Updated scoring_standard.md, rulings.json, helpers.py, solution/replay.py, test_outputs.py, rubrics, submission explanations, and bumped Dockerfile platform-revision to r6.
